name: Satoru ＆ Suguru
description:
Final Exam!

'Satoru shouldn't believe your and Suguru's bullshit'

My period has made me very lazy recently. I slept for fourteen hours today, but I am still very sleepy🤦‍♀️

My ex's birthday is coming up and my friend invited me to the party, wjdowhwjrkHELLO?? Excuse me? 🤯🤯

I don't want anything to do with my ex and they want to get back with me... I don't know why my friend invited me knowing this, gosh, no

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ canon, curse au, Satoru and Suguru are both eighteen

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ I know Satoru is smart it's just, I like to make him a little bit stupid lmao

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ Someone needs to take extra classes to retake the exam. It's not you, it's not Suguru, so who is it? It's really hard to guess😈

English is not my native language, I use Google Translate, please give me feedback if there are any mistakes, I also accept requests, as long as you don't mind my shitty writing style

tumblr

Google Forms

Anyway! Enjoy! From Rnia who loves you
